author_identification.canonical_name_ar: محمد بن عبد الرحمن بن العباس بن عبد الرحمن بن زكريا البغدادي المخلص
author_identification.scholarly_standing: A prominent hadith scholar and narrator from Baghdad, known for his reliability and extensive narrations.

scholarly_context.tradition_position: Part of the broader tradition of hadith compilation and transmission, representing the efforts of scholars to preserve and disseminate prophetic traditions.
scholarly_context.historical_significance: Contributes to the corpus of hadith literature, reflecting the scholarly activities of the 4th century AH in Baghdad.
scholarly_context.muhaqiq_reputation: محمد بن ناصر العجمي is a respected editor known for his meticulous work in hadith and classical Islamic texts.
